conditioning: none at runtime; baked clip selected by core intent
validation: M4 loader checks raw G1 frame alignment, at least two frames, and finite transforms before serving
semantic_action_validation: deferred to the existing motion-asset promotion/human-readability gate; M4 establishes the shipped deterministic provider contract only
